---
pagetitle: "Writing & Media"
page-layout: full
listing:
  id: writing-listing
  contents: post
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  fields: [date, title, subtitle, description, categories]
  image-height: 220px
  grid-columns: 2
  page-size: 1000
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  feed: true
---

```{=html}
<div class="page">
<div class="mast"><div><p class="kick">Essays, Commentary &amp; Press</p><h1 class="name">Writing &amp; Media</h1></div></div>
```

::: {#writing-listing}
:::

```{=html}
<div class="foot"><span class="mail"><a href="mailto:hello@rwhite.no">hello@rwhite.no</a></span><div class="links"><a href="writing.xml">RSS</a><a href="https://github.com/raubreywhite">GitHub</a><a href="https://x.com/raubreywhite">X</a></div></div>
</div>
```
